name: job-dojo
title: Job Dojo
description: AI-powered interview assistant - ask questions, generate recruiter messages, and create LinkedIn connection templates
author: jbharwood

commands.name: ask
commands.title: Ask Job Dojo
commands.subtitle: Job Dojo
commands.description: Ask questions and get AI-powered answers

commands.name: message-template
commands.title: Generate Recruiter Message
commands.subtitle: Job Dojo
commands.description: Generate a professional recruiter outreach message from a job description

commands.name: connection-template
commands.title: Generate Connection Request
commands.subtitle: Job Dojo
commands.description: Generate a LinkedIn connection request message from a job description

commands.name: check-status
commands.title: Check Status
commands.subtitle: Job Dojo
commands.description: Check your Job Dojo account status and usage

commands.name: add-application
commands.title: Add Job Application
commands.subtitle: Job Dojo
commands.description: Add a new job application to track your job search

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: API Key
preferences.description: Your Job Dojo API key. Generate one at jobdojo.app/settings

preferences.name: apiBaseUrl
preferences.title: API Base URL
preferences.description: The base URL for the Job Dojo API (usually https://www.jobdojo.app)

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
